title: Weekend trip: lakeside route
summary: A short trip report with a calm route, great viewpoints, and practical notes for the next visit.
content: This weekend trip was built around a calm lakeside route with easy walking sections and open viewpoints.
The best moments were early morning light and the quiet sections near the old bridge.
For a future visit, I would bring a wider lens for landscape shots and start 30 minutes earlier.
route: Start town -> Forest line -> Lakeside -> Old bridge -> Return
